parents.subject: LU-18876 build: propagate cflags to o2iblnd

commit.subject: LU-18687 debug: cleanly split lustre_compat and debug
commit.message:
LU-18687 debug: cleanly split lustre_compat and debug

... and remove libcfs/ in the process. The debug code will
still be linked into libcfs.ko. But now we will have a clean
logical split between compatability code and debug code.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Change-Id: I44f382d20b1c8ac6cafef6697e4f855d52eb8da4
